metadata.title:
TRYING TO SAVE HIS NECK


BY SACRIFICING HAYWOOD

barrow Bitterly Scores Orchard and Promises
to Prove He Killed Steunenberg to Satisfy


Personal Revenge.

pages.raw_text:
Darrow bitterly resented the i'm
putation that from its inception the
miners federation was pure con-
spiracy to kill or control politics.


1.-THE federation was born right in
the cells below you," he said. ut
was born while Ed Boyce and other
leaders were held there as prison
ers. Hawley, now chief counsel for
the state, was its first attorney It's
purpose was to organize men for
the benefit of workmen, their
widows and orphans.


1.-THE union has been interested
in passing the hour law in Mon
tana, Utah and Colorado, and has
hired lawyers to defend 1t. 1t has
tried to elect judges who would
look upon the laws from the stand
point of the man with the pick and
shovel.


1T took an interest in politics,
but never entered into a criminal
conspiracy"
